$comment: Locale en — activated with --lang en. Every key here must also exist in es.json.

help.text:
validar-flujos.mjs v{version} — n8n static validator (Lite)

Usage:
  node validar-flujos.mjs [options]

Options:
  --input <path>        JSON file or directory to analyze (repeatable).
                        Without --input: walks casos-de-estudio/ and microframework/plantillas/.
  --caso bot|iot        Filter by case (v1 compatibility).
  --estado as-is|to-be  Filter by state (v1 compatibility).
  --format md|json|html|sarif|junit
                        Report format (default: md). Md and html are always
                        saved to disk; json/sarif/junit go to stdout unless
                        --out is passed.
  --out <dir>           Folder for generated files.
                        Default: microframework/validacion/reportes/
  --baseline <json>     Compares against a previous JSON report. Prints a
                        "diff" section with new / resolved / regressed findings.
  --strict              Exit 1 also on warnings (default: errors only).
  --quiet               Don't print the report to stdout (write it only).
  --lang es|en          Language for messages and reports (default: es).
  -h, --help            This help.

Exit code:
  0  → no to-be flow has findings of severity 'error'
  1  → at least one to-be flow has an 'error' finding (or 'warning' if --strict)

error.noFilesFound: No JSON files found to analyze.

reg002.pureOrchestrator: pure orchestrator (run_id delegated to E1 subflow)

reg007.notE2File: not an E2 subflow by name

reg001.fixSecret: Replace the literal with an n8n credential or {{$env.VAR_NAME}}
reg001.headerLiteral: HTTP header "{name}" with a literal value

label.codeSecretAssignment: Literal assignment to a secret variable in Code

reg002.fixRunId: Generate run_id in E1 with crypto.randomUUID() and propagate it through the payload.

reg003.missingErrorWorkflow: settings.errorWorkflow missing or empty on the orchestrator
reg003.fixErrorWorkflow: Configure Settings → Error Workflow pointing to the case's error handler.

reg004.fixLowRetry: Raise maxRetries to 3 with exponential backoff.

reg005.noIdempotency: INSERT without ON CONFLICT or idempotency_key
reg005.fixIdempotency: Add ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING or a unique idempotency_key column.

reg007.ioInE2: I/O node "{type}" present in E2 subflow (domain)
reg007.fixExtractIo: Extract this I/O to an E3 subflow invoked via Execute Workflow.

reg008.ioMisplaced: I/O nodes in a file without the E3/E4/orchestrator convention: {nodes}

reg009.noRespondNode: Orchestrator without a Respond to Webhook node
reg009.fixResponseCodes: Differentiate success (200/201) from client error (4xx) and server error (5xx).

reg010.noAdrFiles: Folder adr/ has no ADR-*.md files

ap001.fixGodNode: Break this node's responsibility into 2–3 cohesive subflows.

ap002.chatty: Possible chatty I/O: HTTP "{httpName}" inside loop "{loopName}"
ap002.fixChatty: Consider a batch endpoint or cache to avoid N HTTP calls.

ap003.fixDualWrite: Implement a saga/compensation pattern or use an explicit BEGIN..COMMIT.

ap004.errorBranchNoLog: Error branch does not end in a structured log or re-throw
ap004.continueOnFailNoHandler: continueOnFail=true without an explicit error branch and without a global errorWorkflow

ap006.stageLeak: Stage leak: node classified as E2 with I/O ({type})

md.title: # Static validation report — Lite v{version}
md.tableHeader: | File | Case | Score | Err | Warn | Info | Nodes | Cyclomatic |
md.dormantRules: - ⚠️ Dormant rules (not exercised by any flow): {list}
md.metrics: - Metrics: nodes={nodes}, edges={edges}, cyclomatic={cyclomatic}, depth={depth}, cohesion={cohesion}
md.stages: - Stages: E1={e1} E2={e2} E3={e3} E4={e4} UNK={unk}

html.title: Validation report — n8n micro-framework
html.subtitle: LC/NC micro-framework · DevSecOps Pillar 2 · Lite Edition v{version}
html.author: Author:
html.radarDesc: Findings aggregated by quality attribute — closer to the center means fewer findings (better).
html.dormantWarning: ⚠️ Rules that no flow in the corpus triggered:
html.allRulesExercised: ✓ All rules were exercised by at least one flow.
html.historyDesc: Average score by date — read from previous JSON reports in reportes/.
html.legendBorderNote: red border = node with an error finding · amber border = warning
html.aboutDesc: Generated by {tool} v{version} (Lite edition) — a single .mjs file with no external dependencies. This HTML is self-contained: no network is required to render it.
html.clickHint: Click a node in the diagram to see its findings, ISO 25010, and ATAM.
